name: Farmers State Bank
description_short: Farmers State Bank Waterloo, IA — Farmers State Bank is a full-service bank offering checking, savings, CDs, mortgages, auto financing, and online banki...
description_long: Farmers State Bank (FSB) has been operating since 1879, positioning itself as a traditional community bank with a modern digital presence. The bank serves customers seeking comprehensive financial products including deposit accounts, lending services, and investment options. FSB offers checking accounts with promotional incentives like free gift sets, savings products including CDs at competitive rates (4.00% APY for 9-month and 17-month terms as of the website snapshot), and lending services spanning mortgages (15-year at 5.625% and 30-year at 6.00% rates), auto financing, and home loans. Their mortgage referral program provides $100 rewards for successful referrals, suggesting an emphasis on relationship-based banking. The bank emphasizes accessibility through online account opening (completed in under 10 minutes), multiple service channels including call centers, ITMs, and physical branches, and partnerships offering customer benefits like 10% TurboTax discounts. FSB distinguishes itself through its long heritage, personalized service (evident in customer testimonials praising smiling staff and fast service), and segmented financial solutions targeting different life stages from "Starting Out" to "Starting a Business." The bank maintains transparent communication about service disruptions, posting advance notice of training closures and holiday hours. An honest assessment reveals FSB operates as a competent regional or community bank with solid rates and service quality, though the website provides limited detail on fees, minimum account balances, loan approval criteria, or specific auto financing terms that consumers typically need for comparison shopping. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Savings accounts and CDs (9-month and 17-month terms at 4.00% APY)
Online account opening and online banking
In-branch teller services at multiple locations
pros: Free Green Checking account with promotional free gift (8-piece Lexi Home storage set)
Competitive CD rates at 4.00% APY for both 9-month and 17-month terms
Online account opening completed in under 10 minutes with no branch visit required
Mortgage referral program offering $100 rewards for successful home purchase/refinance closures
Multiple service channels including call center (877-372-1879), online chat, ITMs, and physical branches
Positive customer testimonials highlighting friendly staff, fast service, and helpful guidance on product options
Established institution since 1879 providing long-term stability and reputation
cons: Website does not disclose checking account fees, minimum balance requirements, or overdraft fees
Limited transparency on auto financing rates, terms, or approval criteria
Mortgage rates appear higher than some national competitors (6.00% for 30-year vs. market alternatives)
Website provides no information about credit card products, investment services, or wealth management offerings
Regular service disruptions due to staff training affect call center and online chat availability
best_for: Community-focused customers prioritizing personalized service and relationship banking over online-only options
Homebuyers and refinancers seeking fixed-rate mortgages with referral rewards
Savers looking for competitive CD rates with a stable, established financial institution
Consumers in areas where FSB has physical branch presence seeking full-service banking convenience
diagnosis: Farmers State Bank is best for customers seeking traditional full-service banking with personalized service, competitive deposit rates, and mortgage lending in areas where they have physical presence. The main caveat is limited online transparency regarding fees, rate competitiveness on mortgages, and the absence of digital-first banking convenience compared to neobanks, requiring customers to contact the bank directly for detailed product terms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
